property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes Only. When this card enters play, its power box becomes a copy of a drill you control's power box until this card leaves play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 3 life cards of damage. Costs 1 power stage to perform. If successful, attach this card to your opponent's MP. While attached, your opponent discards the top card of their life deck at the beginning of each of their Attackers Attacks phases. Discard Black Poisoning when your opponent's MP is at their highest power stage during either player's Declare Step.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. You may pay the cost of this attack with either or both player's anger instead of power stages. Empower 2. For the remainder of combat, you may pay the cost of energy attacks you perform with either or both player's anger instead of power stages.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. look at your opponent's hand and you may choose a card. Your opponent must play that card in their next Defender Defends phase if able.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Transform. Stops an energy attack. If you declared a tokui-waza, remove up to 1 non-combat card in play or a card attached to your MP, from the game. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 8 life cards of damage. Costs 3 power stages to perform. Damage from this attack is removed from the game instead of discarded.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (If your MP has "Sword" in any of its power boxes, this card is considered to be a named card matching your MP.) Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. For the remainder of combat, all of your Orange style attacks are considered to have Sword in the title. If successful, search your discard pile for a card that adds damage to your attacks and place it into your hand, or into play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Discard up to 3 life cards from your life deck. If successful, energy attacks you perform for the remainder of combat do +X life cards of damage, where X= the amount of cards you discarded from your life deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Transform. Stops a physical or energy attack. You may raise your anger 1 level. If you declared a tokui-waza, you may Transform this card as though it was a physical combat card. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Use when entering combat. Raise your anger 1 level. Look at the top X cards of your life deck, where X= your anger level. You may put any amount of those cards at the bottom of your life deck. Put the remaining cards on top of your life deck in any order. If your anger is 3 or higher, draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. For the remainder of combat, you may play with your hand revealed. If you do, and you declared a tokui-waza, raise your anger 2 levels, and this attack does an additional +X life cards of damage, where X= the number of cards in your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (You may use a Saiyan style Non-Combat to Transform this card.) Transform. Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. You may lower your anger to 0 to have this attack do +X life cards of damage, where X= the amount of anger you lowered this way. Prevent X power stages of damage from your opponent's next physical attack this combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 2 life cards of damage. Empower 3. If your opponent performed a successful physical attack in their last attacker attacks phase, this attack costs 0 power stages to perform. This attack does +X life cards of damage, where X= the amount of life cards of damage you took in your last defender defends phase.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (This card's title is considered "Gohan's Kick" for deck construction purposes.) Energy attack. Cards that can end combat, or stop all physical attacks or energy attacks cannot be used for the remainder of combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (You cannot choose a Main Personality, Dragon Ball, Sensei, or Mastery with this card.) Choose up to 5 cards your opponent has in play or under a card in play. Your opponent divides them into 2 piles. Choose 1 pile and shuffle it into their life deck. If Vegeta is in play, and is not your MP, end combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (Cannot be used if your MP is Majin Buu.) Majin only. Remove the top X cards of your opponent's discard pile from the game, where X= the number of Majin personalities in play. For the remainder of combat, attack you perform are considered to have Majin in the title, and are either Focused, or deal +2 power stages or life cards of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: (If you declared a tokui-waza, this card is a styled card matching your tokui-waza) Energy attack. Costs 0 power stages to perform. Choose up to 3 cards with different titles in your opponent's discard pile. Search their discard pile for all copies of those cards and remove them from the game. If you remove less than 5 cards with this effect, this attack does +2 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Twice per game, stops a physical or energy attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: (You cannot gain anger, nor modify the amount of anger gained, via the effects of your Mastery card, or win by MPPV.) Once per combat, during your Attacker Attacks phase, raise your anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Your opponent must reach level 5 to win by MPPV, and cannot win by Dragon Ball Victory until the start of their next turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: Twice per game, during your Attacker Attacks phase, you may remove up to 5 cards from any player's discard pile, divided as you choose, from the game.

property.name: Type
property.value: Dragon Ball

property.name: Text
property.value: Discard up to 1 attached card in play. Reveal up to X cards from your Sensei deck and then shuffle them into your life deck. Choose up to X card in your discard pile and place them in your Sensei deck. X= the number of Demon Realm Dragon Balls you control.

property.name: Type
property.value: Dragon Ball

property.name: Text
property.value: (This card's title is considered to be the title of every Dragon Ball for card effects.) You may raise any personality in play to its highest power stage. Choose 2 cards in your discard pile for every Demon Realm Dragon Ball you control, and shuffle them into your life deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Dragon Ball

property.name: Text
property.value: Draw X cards. Remove X cards in your opponent's discard pile from the game. X= the amount of Demon Realm Dragon Balls you control. At the beginning of your turn, if X= 3, you may shuffle in all the Demon Realm Dragon Balls into their owners' life deck to advance or lower your MP 1 level and you do not discard your drills in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: Personalities cannot use personality powers to perform attacks.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per combat, during their Attacker Attacks phase, each player may have their Main Personality perform an energy attack.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Players may not use Dragon Ball powers when capturing a Dragon Ball. Power: Physical attack doing 6 power stages of damage. If successful, capture a Dragon Ball. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Players may not use Dragon Ball powers when capturing a Dragon Ball. Power: Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. If successful, capture a Dragon Ball. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Your opponent may not use Dragon Ball powers when capturing a Dragon Ball. Power: Physical attack doing +6 power stages of damage. Capture a Dragon Ball.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: (Dr. Arinsu may play Majin Kuu as an ally.) Power: Raise a personality in play to its highest power stage. If Dr. Arinsu is your MP, you may use this power if she is at 5 power stages above 0 or less.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: (Dr. Arinsu may play Majin Duu as an ally.) Power: Physical attack doing 10 power stages of damage. Costs 3 power stage to perform. If Dr. Arinsu is your MP, you may use this power if she is at 5 power stages above 0 or less.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When entering combat, or when you reach this level, draw the bottom card of your discard pile, then remove up to 1 card in your discard pile from the game.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When entering combat, or when you reach this level, draw the bottom card of your discard pile, then remove up to 2 cards in your discard pile from the game. When you have 10 or more cards in your removed from the game pile, your attacks do +1 power stage and +1 life card of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When entering combat, or when you reach this level, draw the bottom card of your discard pile, then remove up to 3 cards in your discard pile from the game. When you have 15 or more cards in your removed from the game pile, your attacks do +2 power stage and +2 life card of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When entering combat, or when you reach this level, draw the bottom card of your discard pile, then remove up to 4 cards in your discard pile from the game. When you have 20 or more cards in your removed from the game pile, your attacks do +3 power stage and +3 life card of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: If Majin Gomah is your MP, anytime you or your opponent gains anger via another effect, raise your anger 1 level. Power: Energy attack. If Majin Gomah is not your MP, this attack does +4 power stages of damage.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: If Majin Gomah is your MP, anytime you or your opponent gains anger via another effect, raise your anger 1 level. Your opponent cannot add cards to their hand via card effects.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: (If this card is in your MP stack, you cannot win by MPPV.) Constant Combat Power: At the end of combat, if you did not use your personality power, raise your anger 2 levels. Power: Stops a physical or energy attack. Raise your anger 2 levels.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Power: Focused physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. At the end of combat, set Majin Gomah's power level to full. If successful, you may lower your opponent's MP 1 personality level and your opponent can not use personality powers until the end of combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Your Dragon Balls cannot be captured. Neva does not need to be in control of combat to use this power. If your MP is Tamagami, this card gains Resist.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: (If your MP is Majin, this card is considered Majin, and your deck may include up to 3 copies of this card.) Power: Energy attack doing 2 power stages of damage for each Majin personality in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Glorio may take control of combat and use this Constant Combat Power even if your MP is not at 0 or 1 above 0. While he is in control of combat, you may discard a card from your hand to have Glorio perform an energy attack. Damage from your attacks cannot be prevented.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: Power: Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. If you declared a tokui-waza, raise your MP to its highest power stage, then shuffle the top 4 cards of your discard pile into your life deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Power: When entering combat, draw a card. Power: Use one of your lower level personality powers.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Twice per combat, when you perform an attack from your hand, you may choose to have it remain in play to be used an additional time this combat. Attacks you perform that remain in play are placed at the bottom of your life deck after used instead of discarded or removed from the game.
